# Abhishek Thakur

> Senior full-stack engineer specialising in SaaS platforms and payment systems.
> Node.js, NestJS, React, TypeScript, Stripe, Firebase, GCP. Based in Chandigarh, India.
> Open to senior / staff roles, remote, global.

- Site: https://abhithakur.dev
- Résumé (PDF): https://abhithakur.dev/resume.pdf
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/abhi-thakur-dev/
- GitHub: https://github.com/abhithakur7
- Email: thakur.abhi270@gmail.com

## Case studies

- [Uplevelit](https://abhithakur.dev/work/uplevelit): Led engineering on an
  Experience-as-a-Service marketplace — bookable 1:1s, group sessions,
  livecourses, and Q&A. Stack: TypeScript, React, Firebase Functions / Hosting,
  Stripe, Twilio Video, Bunny Stream, SendGrid.
- [Penbook](https://abhithakur.dev/work/penbook): Solo-built an AI-powered
  reading + writing platform as a modular NestJS monolith on MongoDB, with
  OpenAI tooling across writing, reading, content, and book clubs.
- [Rocket Rebates](https://abhithakur.dev/work/rocket-rebates): Solo-built
  rebate discovery + AI report generation + admin-reviewed submission workflow.
  NestJS, PostgreSQL on RDS, S3 with signed URLs, OpenAI jobs for reports and
  document checklists.
